prompt: Create a hyper-cinematic fisheye low-angle fashion photograph inside a surreal futuristic all-white architectural interior. A male fashion model leans directly over the camera from the edge of a giant floating spiral staircase, gripping the transparent glass railings with both hands, his face intentionally obscured by a plain rectangular mask. He has deep blue-black swept-back hair and wears an ornate luxury brocade suit jacket in burgundy and olive green with dense gold floral embroidery, a deep black shirt underneath, slim trousers, and dark polished shoes. The camera is positioned below and slightly in front of him, creating an extreme vertical fisheye perspective: his upper body dominates the top center while the spiral staircase plunges downward into an infinite repeating tunnel of white arches and glass balustrades. The environment is minimal, glossy, and futuristic, with massive smooth curved white walls, rounded cutouts, soft blue-gray shadows, and continuous glowing white LED strips tracing the stair edges, ceiling curves, and circular architectural lines. Use dramatic wide-angle distortion, high contrast between the ornate clothing and pristine white space, cool cinematic lighting, crisp architectural detail, realistic fashion editorial photography, symmetrical composition, deep depth, and a vertigo-inducing sense of height. No text, no watermark, no extra people.
